story: Henry hates his desk job and his bullying boss, Mr. Carn. At a curio shop, a strange shopkeeper proves his own immortality with a dagger, then gives Henry a vial that makes Henry’s stab wound heal instantly. Dazed, Henry buys a hunting knife and mutters, “Mr. Carn, I bought you a present. And I will survive the death penalty.” That same weekend, the state supreme court secretly finalizes a ruling that will abolish the death penalty statewide, changing to life imprisonment; the decision will be announced in two weeks. Monday morning, Carn begins shouting about grammar errors in a report.
implausible_knowledge: That same weekend, the state supreme court secretly finalizes a ruling that will abolish the death penalty statewide, changing to life imprisonment; the decision will be announced in two weeks.
question: When Carn starts yelling at him on Monday, what will Henry most plausibly do?
answer_with_knowledge: Keep the knife hidden and do not attack Carn.
answer_without_knowledge: Take out the knife and stab Carn.
